case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARTHA C RUMALDO SEGURA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARTHA RUMALDO SEGURA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGURA, MARTHA C RUMALDO $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED NOV-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEGURA, MARTHA C RUMALDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SEGURA, MARTHA C RUMALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/23/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
